about.heading1: A school where every child is known, seen, and

whyUs.description: From the smallest details of daily care to the boldest dreams of a Glider graduate — every part of our school is designed to help your child rise.

academics.title1: A program for every stage of
academics.description: From the wonder of Nursery to the confidence of Primary 6, our three-stage pathway guides every Glider through a curriculum that is rigorous, joyful, and unmistakably African.

faculty.description: Certified, passionate, and deeply caring — our educators are the soul of Trail Gliders. They don't just teach. They mentor, inspire, and walk alongside every child.

admissions.paragraph: Whether you are joining us from Nursery or transferring into Primary 5, we make the admissions journey warm, transparent, and welcoming — just like our school.
admissions.limitedSpots: Limited spots available across all stages.
admissions.admissionsReplies: Our admissions team replies within 24 hours.

faq.description: Everything you need to know about life at Trail Gliders. Can't find your answer? Reach our team any time.

contact.description: Have a question about admissions, programs, or campus life? Reach out — our friendly team will respond within one business day.
contact.formDescription: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.subject: I'm interested in
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your child and what you'd like to know...
contact.messageReceived: Message received. We'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.messageSent: Message sent! We'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by Trail Gliders Academy. We respect your privacy.

footer.readyDesc: Admissions for the 2026/2027 session are now open. Schedule a visit today.
footer.subscribed: You're subscribed! Watch your inbox for Glider updates.
